prestazioni: VR38DETT 3.8L twin-turbo V6: Full billet aluminum block reinforcement by Tomei with 95mm bore sleeves, forged internals including Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, and a Tomei Type-S 272° camshaft kit with titanium retainers and upgraded valve springs for 8,500 RPM redline capability

Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX5533R Gen II ball-bearing turbos with 64mm billet compressor wheels, 106mm turbine wheels, and custom 4-inch titanium downpipes by HKS with 3.5-inch V-band clamps and ceramic-coated turbine housings for reduced heat soak

Fuel system overhaul with Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, dual Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pumps, Radium Engineering dual catch cans with -10AN lines, and a Motec M150 ECU with custom VR38DETT-specific firmware for flex-fuel E85 compatibility and 1,200+ horsepower mapping
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS R35 NISMO widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a functional ram-air scoop and integrated NACA ducts

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts, and custom valving for the R35 NISMO chassis, combined with Nismo S-Tune 20mm front and 15mm rear adjustable sway bars with spherical end links

Custom 22-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels in a staggered 10.5x22 ET+15 front and 12.5x22 ET+20 rear configuration, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 335/25 rear), with AP Racing CP9460 front and CP9461 rear 6-piston calipers clamping 400mm two-piece rotors
